title: 45.9ft Fabric Bunting Flags, 46Pcs Vintage Garden Bunting + Drawstring Bag, Floral Bunting for Birthday, Party, Easter, Festival, Afternoon Tea Decorations
features: ❤️ Package Inclusions & Size - The package brings with a total of 14M long vintage floral bunting(46 Flags) and a high-quality floral drawstring bag. Flag Size: approx 5.7"x7.6"x7.6"(14.5CMx19.5CMx19.5CM) . Both convenient and great value.
❤️ Premium Materials - Our bunting flags are made of Durable and Soft Cotton Fabric. It's tasteless, bunting outdoor, comfortable & skin-friendly.
❤️ Unique Floral Design - 46 flags have a total of 14 various designs, filled of Vintage elements (dots, flowers in diverse styles). Different from the typical Floral bunting, our more vibrant.
❤️ Widely Used - Orifinter Mix Floral bunting is suitable for afternoon tea decorations, easter decorations, union jack party, coronation decorations, bell tent, bedroom, birthday decoration.

❤️100% SATISFACTION GUARANTEE: We promise you a lifetime return and exchange service as well as 24-hour customer service. If you are not satisfied with the product or the bunting is damaged, please contact us.
description: Product Description Why choose Orifinter Floral Vintage Bunting? Reusable - We provide floral drawstring bag so you can pack your banners easily. Durable & Not Easy to Fade - The flags are made of cotton material, very suitable for decorating all kinds of parties, indoor and outdoor activities. Vintage & Exquisite - Vintage colors and floral patterns are suitable for many occasions, such as weddings, banquets, birthday parties, graduation ceremonies, etc. High quality choice: Composed of more than a dozen patterns, including flowers, dots, bows, stripes, etc. The flags are neat cut and will keep their shape in wind.
